title: zoysia seslerioides
intro: Zoysia seslerioides, also known as Chinese chufa or Chinese shoofly grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Zoysia seslerioides include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
